message:
docs: Update branding to reflect multi-platform support

- Change emoji from 🍎 (iCloud-only) to 📷 (generic image)
- Rename "Get iCloud Image Link" → "Get Image from Internet Link"
- Add supported platforms list to help text and installer
- Update quickstart examples to show Dropbox and Google Photos
- Expand banner width to accommodate longer title

This reflects giil's evolution from an iCloud-only tool to a
multi-platform image downloader supporting iCloud, Dropbox,
Google Photos, and Google Drive.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

echo -e "\n${BOLD}${MAGENTA}╔════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}" >&2 - echo -e "${BOLD}${MAGENTA}║${NC} ${BOLD}🍎 giil v${VERSION}${NC} ${BOLD}${MAGENTA}║${NC}" >&2 - echo -e "${BOLD}${MAGENTA}║${NC} ${DIM}Get iCloud Image Link${NC} ${BOLD}${MAGENTA}║${NC}" >&2 - then gum style --foreground 82 "✓ $1" >&2 else @@ -462,65 +462,202 @@ log_success() { # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- show_help() { - cat << 'EOF' -giil - Get iCloud Image Link (Hybrid Edition v3.0) -Downloads images from iCloud photo shares with maximum reliability - -Usage: - giil [options] - -Options: - --base64 Output image as base64 text instead of saving file - --json Output JSON with path, datetime, sourceUrl, captureMethod - --all Download ALL photos from a shared album (iterates thumbnails) - --output DIR Output directory (default: current directory) - --preserve Keep original bytes (skip MozJPEG compression) - --convert FMT Convert to format: jpeg, png, webp - --quality N JPEG/WebP quality 1-100 (default: 85) - --update Force update Playwright and dependencies - --debug Enable debug mode with extra logging and artifacts - --verbose Show detailed progress (implies --debug) - --trace Enable Playwright tracing for deep debugging - --print-url Output resolved direct URL instead of downloading - --debug-dir DIR Directory for debug artifacts (default: current) - --timeout N Page load timeout in seconds (default: 60) - --version Show version information - --help Show this help message - -v3.0 Behavior Change: - MozJPEG compression is now applied by default for optimal file size. - Use --preserve to keep original bytes without recompression. - -Supported URL formats: - https://share.icloud.com/photos/ - https://www.icloud.com/photos/# - -Capture Strategy (in order of preference): - 1. Click Download button (highest quality, original file) - 2. Intercept CDN response (full-resolution image) - 3. Screenshot image element - 4. Screenshot viewport (last resort) - -Output Modes: - Default: Prints file path to stdout - --json: {"path": "...", "datetime": "...", "sourceUrl": "...", "method": "..."} - --base64: Prints base64-encoded JPEG to stdout - --all: Downloads all images, outputs one path/JSON per line - -Examples: - # Download single photo - giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/02cD9okNHvVd-uuDnPCH3ZEEA" - - # Download to specific directory with lower quality - giil "https://www.icloud.com/photos/#02cD9okNHvVd" --output ~/Downloads --quality 70 - - # Get JSON output for scripting - giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/xxx" --json - - # Download entire shared album - giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/xxx" --all --output ~/album + if [[ "$GUM_AVAILABLE" == "true" ]]; then + # Beautiful gum-styled help + gum style \ + --border double \ + --border-foreground 212 \ + --padding "1 2" \ + --margin "1" \ + --bold \ + "📷 giil v${VERSION}" \ + "Get Image from Internet Link" + + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "DESCRIPTION" + gum style --padding "0 2" "Downloads images from cloud photo sharing services with maximum reliability. +Uses Playwright for browser automation with a 4-tier capture strategy." + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "USAGE" + echo " giil [OPTIONS]" + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "SUPPORTED PLATFORMS" + gum style --foreground 82 " ✓ iCloud Photos" + gum style --foreground 245 " share.icloud.com/photos/..." + gum style --foreground 245 " www.icloud.com/photos/#..." + gum style --foreground 82 " ✓ Dropbox" + gum style --foreground 245 " dropbox.com/s/..." + gum style --foreground 245 " dropbox.com/scl/fi/..." + gum style --foreground 82 " ✓ Google Photos" + gum style --foreground 245 " photos.app.goo.gl/..." + gum style --foreground 245 " photos.google.com/share/..." + gum style --foreground 82 " ✓ Google Drive" + gum style --foreground 245 " drive.google.com/file/d/..." + gum style --foreground 245 " drive.google.com/open?id=..." + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "OPTIONS" + gum style --foreground 39 " Output Format" + gum style --faint " --json Output JSON metadata" + gum style --faint " --base64 Output base64-encoded image" + gum style --faint " --print-url Output direct URL instead of downloading" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " Image Processing" + gum style --faint " --output DIR Save to directory (default: current)" + gum style --faint " --quality N JPEG/WebP quality 1-100 (default: 85)" + gum style --faint " --preserve Keep original bytes (skip compression)" + gum style --faint " --convert FMT Convert to: jpeg, png, webp" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " Album Mode" + gum style --faint " --all Download ALL photos from shared album" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " Behavior" + gum style --faint " --timeout N Page load timeout in seconds (default: 60)" + gum style --faint " --quiet Suppress progress messages" + gum style --faint " --update Force update Playwright and dependencies" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " Debugging" + gum style --faint " --debug Save debug artifacts on failure" + gum style --faint " --verbose Show detailed progress" + gum style --faint " --trace Enable Playwright tracing" + gum style --faint " --debug-dir DIR Directory for debug artifacts" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " Information" + gum style --faint " --version Show version" + gum style --faint " --help Show this help" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "CAPTURE STRATEGY" + gum style --padding "0 2" "Images are captured using a 4-tier strategy (in priority order):" + gum style --foreground 82 " 1. Download button" --faint "— Click native download (original file)" + gum style --foreground 82 " 2. Network CDN" --faint " — Intercept CDN response (full-res)" + gum style --foreground 82 " 3. Element shot" --faint " — Screenshot element" + gum style --foreground 82 " 4. Viewport shot" --faint " — Screenshot visible area (fallback)" + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "OUTPUT MODES" + gum style --foreground 82 " stdout:" + gum style --faint " Default: /path/to/image_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.jpg" + gum style --faint " --json: {\"ok\":true,\"path\":\"...\",\"method\":\"...\",\"size\":...}" + gum style --faint " --base64: /9j/4AAQSkZJRg... (raw base64)" + gum style --foreground 208 " stderr:" + gum style --faint " Progress messages with [giil] prefix" + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "EXAMPLES" + gum style --foreground 39 " # Download from iCloud" + echo " giil \"https://share.icloud.com/photos/ABC123\"" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " # Download from Dropbox with lower quality" + echo " giil \"https://dropbox.com/s/abc123/photo.jpg\" --quality 70" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " # Get JSON output from Google Photos" + echo " giil \"https://photos.app.goo.gl/ABC123\" --json" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " # Download entire iCloud album" + echo " giil \"https://share.icloud.com/photos/ABC123\" --all --output ~/album" + echo "" + gum style --foreground 39 " # Get base64 for embedding" + echo " giil \"https://drive.google.com/file/d/ABC123/view\" --base64" + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 214 --bold "EXIT CODES" + gum style --faint " 0 Success" + gum style --faint " 2 Usage error (bad arguments)" + gum style --faint " 10 Network error" + gum style --faint " 11 Auth required (private content)" + gum style --faint " 12 Not found (expired/invalid link)" + gum style --faint " 13 Unsupported platform" + echo "" + + gum style --foreground 245 --italic "First run installs Playwright+Chromium (~200MB, cached in ~/.cache/giil)" + else + # Fallback plain-text help + cat << EOF +giil v${VERSION} — Get Image from Internet Link + +Downloads images from cloud photo sharing services with maximum reliability. + +USAGE + giil [OPTIONS] + +SUPPORTED PLATFORMS + ✓ iCloud Photos share.icloud.com/photos/... | www.icloud.com/photos/#... + ✓ Dropbox dropbox.com/s/... | dropbox.com/scl/fi/... + ✓ Google Photos photos.app.goo.gl/... | photos.google.com/share/... + ✓ Google Drive drive.google.com/file/d/... | drive.google.com/open?id=... + +OPTIONS + Output Format: + --json Output JSON metadata + --base64 Output base64-encoded image + --print-url Output direct URL instead of downloading + + Image Processing: + --output DIR Save to directory (default: current) + --quality N JPEG/WebP quality 1-100 (default: 85) + --preserve Keep original bytes (skip compression) + --convert FMT Convert to: jpeg, png, webp + + Album Mode: + --all Download ALL photos from shared album + + Behavior: + --timeout N Page load timeout in seconds (default: 60) + --quiet Suppress progress messages + --update Force update Playwright and dependencies + + Debugging: + --debug Save debug artifacts on failure + --verbose Show detailed progress + --trace Enable Playwright tracing + --debug-dir DIR Directory for debug artifacts + + Information: + --version Show version + --help Show this help + +CAPTURE STRATEGY (in priority order) + 1. Download button — Click native download (original file) + 2. Network CDN — Intercept CDN response (full-res) + 3. Element shot — Screenshot element + 4. Viewport shot — Screenshot visible area (fallback) + +OUTPUT MODES + stdout: + Default: /path/to/image_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.jpg + --json: {"ok":true,"path":"...","method":"...","size":...} + --base64: /9j/4AAQSkZJRg... (raw base64) + stderr: + Progress messages with [giil] prefix + +EXAMPLES + # Download from iCloud + giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/ABC123" + + # Download from Dropbox with lower quality + giil "https://dropbox.com/s/abc123/photo.jpg" --quality 70 + + # Get JSON output from Google Photos + giil "https://photos.app.goo.gl/ABC123" --json + + # Download entire iCloud album + giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/ABC123" --all --output ~/album + +EXIT CODES + 0 Success + 2 Usage error + 10 Network error + 11 Auth required + 12 Not found + 13 Unsupported platform + +First run installs Playwright+Chromium (~200MB, cached in ~/.cache/giil) EOF + fi exit 0 } @@ -723,9 +860,15 @@ ensure_playwright() { PACKAGE_EOF cd "$GIIL_HOME" - log_step "Installing npm packages..." - npm install --silent --no-fund --no-audit --include=optional 2>/dev/null || \ - npm install --no-fund --no-audit --include=optional >&2 + if [[ "$GUM_AVAILABLE" == "true" ]]; then + gum spin --spinner dot --title "Installing npm packages..." -- \ + npm install --silent --no-fund --no-audit --include=optional 2>/dev/null || \ + npm install --no-fund --no-audit --include=optional >&2 + else + log_step "Installing npm packages..." + npm install --silent --no-fund --no-audit --include=optional 2>/dev/null || \ + npm install --no-fund --no-audit --include=optional >&2 + fi # Verify sharp runtime is usable; install platform-specific prebuilds if needed. if ! node -e "require('sharp')" >/dev/null 2>&1; then @@ -785,24 +928,36 @@ PACKAGE_EOF fi fi - log_step "Installing Chromium browser..." export PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH - npx playwright install chromium 2>&1 | sed '/^$/d' >&2 || { + local chromium_installed=false + if [[ "$GUM_AVAILABLE" == "true" ]]; then + if gum spin --spinner dot --title "Installing Chromium browser (~150MB)..." -- \ + npx playwright install chromium 2>/dev/null; then + chromium_installed=true + fi + else + log_step "Installing Chromium browser..." + if npx playwright install chromium 2>&1 | sed '/^$/d' >&2; then + chromium_installed=true + fi + fi + + if [[ "$chromium_installed" != "true" ]]; then local os os=$(detect_os) if [[ "$os" == "linux" ]]; then log_warn "Trying with system dependencies (may require sudo)..." - npx playwright install --with-deps chromium 2>&1 | sed '/^$/d' >&2 || { + if ! npx playwright install --with-deps chromium 2>&1 | sed '/^$/d' >&2; then log_error "Failed to install Chromium. Try manually:" log_error " npx playwright install --with-deps chromium" exit "$EXIT_DEPENDENCY_ERROR" - } + fi else log_error "Failed to install Chromium. Try manually:" log_error " npx playwright install chromium" exit "$EXIT_DEPENDENCY_ERROR" fi - } + fi touch "$lock_file" log_info "Setup complete!" @@ -916,14 +1071,20 @@ const traceMode = args[11] === 'true'; const printUrlMode = args[12] === 'true'; const debugDir = args[13] || ''; const preserveMode = args[14] === 'true'; // v3.0+: skip MozJPEG compression, keep original bytes +const quietMode = args[15] === 'true'; // Suppress progress messages -// Verbose logging helper +// Verbose logging helper (only logs if not in quiet mode) function verbose(msg) { - if (verboseMode) console.error(`[giil] ${msg}`); + if (verboseMode && !quietMode) console.error(`[giil] ${msg}`); +} + +// Info logging helper (respects quiet mode) +function logInfo(msg) { + if (!quietMode) console.error(`[giil] ${msg}`); } if (!url) { - console.error('Usage: node extractor.mjs '); + console.error('Usage: node extractor.mjs '); process.exit(ExitCodes.USAGE_ERROR); } @@ -1011,7 +1172,7 @@ async function downloadGooglePhotosFullRes(cdnUrl) { } const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer()); - console.error(`[giil] Downloaded Google Photos full-res: ${(buffer.length / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`); + logInfo(`Downloaded Google Photos full-res: ${(buffer.length / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`); return { buffer, url: fullResUrl }; } catch (e) { console.error(`[giil] Google Photos download error: ${e.message}`); @@ -1188,7 +1349,7 @@ async function captureGoogleDrive(page, fileId, debugMode) { const path = await dl.path(); if (path) { const buf = readFileSync(path); - console.error('[giil] GDrive download: ' + (buf.length / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB'); + logInfo('GDrive download: ' + (buf.length / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB'); return { bytes: buf, method: 'download-button', tier: 1, sourceUrl: getGoogleDriveViewerUrl(fileId) }; } } @@ -1203,7 +1364,7 @@ async function captureGoogleDrive(page, fileId, debugMode) { if (res.ok && (res.headers.get('content-type') || '').startsWith('image/')) { const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer()); if (!validateGoogleDriveResponse(buf).isError) { - console.error('[giil] GDrive direct: ' + (buf.length / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB'); + logInfo('GDrive direct: ' + (buf.length / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB'); return { bytes: buf, method: 'direct-url', tier: 2, sourceUrl: url }; } } @@ -1217,7 +1378,7 @@ async function captureGoogleDrive(page, fileId, debugMode) { if (res.ok) { const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
